name: Smart Wishlist
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can integrate Smart Wishlist functionality to enable customers to save and organize products for future consideration. Wishlist features help improve customer retention by giving shoppers a way to curate and track items they're interested in, encouraging return visits and eventual purchases."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Smart Wishlist integration provides customers with a convenient tool for managing their shopping intentions over time. By allowing customers to save products across browsing sessions, you reduce the pressure for immediate purchase decisions while gathering valuable data about product interest that can inform merchandising and marketing strategies."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Adding wishlist functionality to your store enhances user engagement and allows customers to save products for future purchase consideration. This technical documentation outlines the steps to integrate wishlist icons using the \"Smart Wishlist\" app within our Shopify app built with Liquid."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]},
